meta.title: User Guide | Kaitu
meta.description: Learn how to sign up, install, and use Kaitu with detailed video tutorials and FAQs. Supports macOS, Windows, iOS, and Android.

hero.title: Kaitu User Guide
hero.subtitle: Stable, simple, and designed for families

video.title: Video Tutorial
video.description: Learn how to sign up, install, and use Kaitu in 6 minutes

stable.title: Stable & Smooth
stable.description: Our proprietary k2cc congestion control algorithm keeps things running smoothly, even during peak hours

simple.title: Easy to Use
simple.description: No complicated setup — just log in and go

education.title: Designed for Education
education.description: Child safety features coming soon to help parents manage access to inappropriate websites

step1.title: How to Sign Up
step1.description: Sign up through a referral link to get an extra 30 days of access. Open the link in your browser, enter your email and verification code, confirm to log in. Then choose a plan and complete payment.

tips.verifyCode: The verification code usually arrives within one minute — check your spam folder
tips.payment: We accept Alipay, WeChat Pay, and credit cards. Alipay is the easiest option
tips.wechatPay: WeChat Pay requires two devices — you cannot scan a QR code screenshot on the same phone
tips.safety: Payment information is not tracked — your bank cannot see what you purchased

step2.title: How to Install
step2.description: On the device where you want to install, open kaitu.io in your browser and click the download button. The page will automatically detect your operating system.

platforms.macos: macOS: You'll need to enter your password during installation — this is required. If the system blocks the installation, go to System Settings → Privacy & Security to allow it.
platforms.windows: Windows: If a blue security prompt appears, click "More info" to continue. If the browser blocks the download, click "Keep".
platforms.ios: iOS: Currently available for direct installation from the App Store. You'll need your Apple ID password.
platforms.android: Android: If direct installation fails, you can use the desktop app's "Account → Install on Other Devices" feature to install via USB.

step3.title: How to Use
step3.description: The mobile and desktop interfaces are identical. After logging in, select a route and tap Connect.

tips.mode: If certain websites are inaccessible, switch to "Global" mode. Note that in Global mode, domestic websites will also be routed through the proxy.
tips.feedback: The floating icon on the interface lets you submit feedback anytime — it automatically uploads logs to help engineers diagnose issues quickly.
tips.devices: One account supports 5 devices simultaneously, intended for family use.

step4.title: How to Get Help
step4.description: If you encounter any issues, you can reach our support team through the following channels.

tips.ai: Our support is AI-assisted and can interpret screenshots to guide you through solutions
tips.video: You can request a video call for one-on-one assistance if needed
tips.screenshot: Upload a screenshot when you encounter an issue — the AI support can quickly identify and suggest a solution

multiDevice.question: How many devices can I use with one account?
multiDevice.answer: Each subscription supports up to 5 devices online simultaneously — phones, tablets, and computers. Share with the whole family.

verifyCode.question: What if I don't receive the verification code?
verifyCode.answer: The verification code usually arrives within one minute. Please check your spam folder first. If it still doesn't arrive, try resending. We recommend using international email services like Gmail or Outlook.

paymentSafety.question: Can my payment be tracked?
paymentSafety.answer: No. We've confirmed with banks that transaction records do not show what was purchased. We make every effort to protect user privacy. If you're concerned, you can enter any name during payment.

wechatPay.question: Why does WeChat Pay fail?
wechatPay.answer: WeChat Pay requires two devices — you cannot scan a QR code screenshot on the same device. This is a WeChat security restriction. We recommend using Alipay instead, which is simpler.

windowsBlueScreen.question: What about the blue security prompt on Windows?
windowsBlueScreen.answer: This is a normal Windows SmartScreen prompt. Click "More info", then click "Run anyway". Our app is properly code-signed, and this prompt will disappear automatically as our user base grows.

macPassword.question: Why does macOS ask for a password during installation?
macPassword.answer: macOS requires administrator authorization to install system-level network tools — this is an Apple security requirement. Just enter your Mac login password. You may also need to enter your password during software updates.

androidInstall.question: What if I can't install on Android?
androidInstall.answer: With so many Android brands, some phones may block installation. You can try: 1. Upload a screenshot to our support chat for targeted guidance; 2. Use the desktop app's "Account → Install on Other Devices" to install via USB cable; 3. Request a video call for one-on-one assistance.

globalMode.question: What's the difference between Smart and Global mode?
globalMode.answer: Smart mode only proxies overseas websites while keeping domestic sites direct — recommended for daily use. Global mode proxies all traffic, useful when specific sites are inaccessible. In Global mode, domestic apps like Baidu and WeChat will also go through the proxy.

connectionFailed.question: What if I can't connect?
connectionFailed.answer: Please try: 1. Switch to a different node; 2. Restart the app; 3. Check your internet connection. If the problem persists, click the feedback button in the app to submit logs, and our engineers will diagnose the issue quickly.

platforms.question: Which devices are supported?
platforms.answer: We support iOS (iPhone/iPad), Android phones, macOS, and Windows — one account works across all platforms.

contact.title: Need Help? Contact Us
contact.description: Our support team is here to help
contact.liveChatDescription: Click to chat with support now
